title: Agent full-flow audit and repair
goal: Inspect all agent-related backend, CLI, UI, process, and validation flows; fix source-backed defects and prove the repaired flows with automated and product-path verification.
routing: specialized-workflow + noisy-tools + manual codegraph because the scope crosses API, CLI, Web/UI, docs, process, and e2e validation while CodeGraph is not initialized.
single_writer: main-agent owns writes in this checkout; invest subagents are read-only until implementation todos receive disjoint allowed files.

invest_subagents.scope: agent docs, process, and e2e validation inventory

acceptance: Source-backed issue list covers backend, CLI, Web/UI, docs/process, and validation assets.
Every code fix has a focused test or e2e/product-path verification signal.
No default-off safety gate, endpoint contract, auth token behavior, or public CLI default is changed without an explicit architecture record.
No unrelated user edits are reverted.
Final evidence includes command logs, screenshots or browser/desktop proof when UI/product flows are touched, and a concise functional-flow explanation.
